scope_boundary: synthetic command-contract and semantic-atom record discipline plus finite Lean predicates only; no prompt-injection resistance result, semantic parser completeness, deployed command dispatcher, runtime execution, source interpretation, or source-derived support-state promotion
transition_reason: The repository has command-contract and semantic-atom schemas, protocol fixtures, finite CommandContracts Lean predicates, exact source mappings for the Command Contracts and Semantic Interfaces chapter, and a synthetic plan-execution contract harness. Those artifacts make explicit objective, constraints, output contract, verification, failure behavior, requirement preservation, and approval-bypass rejection executable at the record level. They still do not establish prompt-injection resistance, semantic parser completeness, deployed command dispatch, runtime execution correctness, source interpretation adequacy, or model behavior.
required_artifacts: semantic-command parser evaluation over real tasks
prompt-injection and hidden-instruction override test suite
deployed command dispatcher or replayable command-to-effect trace
runtime failure-behavior trace with recovery and residuals
artifact verification trace over actual outputs
independent review of command-schema completeness and override resistance
source interpretation review for command-contract source mappings
accepted upward evidence-transition review for any narrowed stronger claim
verification_command: python3 scripts/validate_plan_execution_contracts.py && python3 scripts/validate_evidence_transitions.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_evidence_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_v1_status_snapshot.py
negative_results: Command Contracts and Semantic Interfaces remains at argument
schema validation checks record shape rather than semantic parser completeness
finite Lean predicates remain useful but too narrow for prompt-injection resistance, deployed dispatch, runtime execution, or artifact-quality claims
source interpretation review and model behavior are not implemented
downgrade_triggers: chapter text interpreted as deployed command-dispatch evidence
synthetic approval-bypass rejection interpreted as prompt-injection resistance
finite Lean predicates treated as deployed runtime behavior
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after the claim is narrowed to the synthetic record discipline that passed, or after semantic-parser evaluations, prompt-injection and hidden-instruction override suites, deployed command-dispatch traces, runtime failure-behavior replays, artifact verification traces, independent command-schema review, and source-interpretation review are recorded with accepted evidence-transition records.
limitations: synthetic fixtures do not prove prompt-injection resistance
schema validation does not prove semantic parser completeness
finite Lean predicates do not implement command dispatch
approval-bypass rejection fixtures do not prove runtime policy enforcement
artifact refs do not prove artifact quality
no independent parser-quality, prompt-injection, runtime, artifact-review, or source-interpretation review has been recorded
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent semantic-parser, prompt-injection, runtime-systems, artifact-quality, formal-methods, or source-interpretation audit
acceptance_blockers: no prompt-injection or hidden-instruction override test suite
no deployed command dispatcher or replayable command-to-effect trace
no artifact verification trace over actual outputs
non_claims: does not promote Command Contracts and Semantic Interfaces above argument
does not prove semantic parser completeness
does not prove deployed command dispatch or runtime execution
